data.title: Golden Cariboo Resources Extends Private Placement for Quesnelle Project
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.

Golden Cariboo Resources ( (TSE:GCC) ) has provided an update.

Golden Cariboo Resources Ltd. has announced the extension of its private placement initially revealed in January, with a second tranche expected to close by the end of the month. The company has already raised $773,915 from selling 5,953,191 units, with proceeds earmarked for further exploration and general working capital, pending approval from the Canadian Securities Exchange.

More about Golden Cariboo Resources

Golden Cariboo Resources Ltd. is a mining company focused on rediscovering the Cariboo Gold Rush through targeted drilling and trenching programs at the Quesnelle Gold Quartz Mine property in British Columbia. The property is adjacent to significant geological features and has a history of gold production, with ongoing placer mining.

Telenor ( (GB:0G8C) ) has provided an announcement.

Pieter Knook, a board member of Telenor ASA, has acquired 1,500 shares of the company, bringing his total holdings to the same amount. This transaction, which adheres to EU Market Regulation requirements, reflects potential confidence in the company’s future performance and may impact investor perception and market dynamics.

More about Telenor

Telenor ASA operates in the telecommunications industry, offering a range of services including mobile telephony, broadband, and TV services. The company focuses on the Nordic and Asian markets, providing connectivity and communication solutions to millions of customers.

data.title: BlueOne Card Delays Quarterly Report Filing
data.description:
Blueone Card ( (BCRD) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

BlueOne Card, Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify a delay in their Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the financial period ending December 31, 2024. The primary reason for this delay is the inability to complete the review process with their auditor in a timely manner. The company expects to file the delayed report within five calendar days following the prescribed due date. Importantly, there are no anticipated changes in the financial results from the corresponding period last fiscal year, and no forward-looking statements have been made. The company is actively working on compliance and the notification has been signed by James Koh, the Chief Executive Officer.

More about Blueone Card

data.title: US Premium Beef Reports Record High Premiums in 2024
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

US Premium Beef ( (USBBU) ) has provided an update.

In fiscal year 2024, U.S. Premium Beef, LLC achieved record high premiums on its Kansas grid of $79.13 per head, marking the third consecutive year of over $70 premiums. Despite a slight decrease in fed cattle harvest, Kansas saw record live market prices and increased carcass weights, contributing to high premiums and improving yield benefits. The Iowa grid, in its fifth year, also reported record high Prime percentages, significantly exceeding national averages, which bolstered quality grade premiums. The total number of cattle delivered across both grids was the third highest in company history, reflecting strong participation despite regional differences in grid structure. These achievements underscore the company’s commitment to rewarding high-quality beef production and its impact on market dynamics.

More about US Premium Beef

U.S. Premium Beef, LLC operates in the meat processing industry, primarily focusing on cattle and beef products. The company offers a grid pricing system that rewards higher quality beef production, particularly through its Kansas and Iowa grids, which incentivize producers with premiums for superior quality and yield grades.

For an in-depth examination of USBBU stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Mare Group S.p.A. Reports Strategic Share Repurchase
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Mare Engineering Group SpA ( (IT:MARE) ) has shared an update.

Mare Group S.p.A. announced the purchase of 14,721 of its own shares, valued at approximately Euro 64,024.18, as part of a program approved by its shareholders and board. These transactions, executed through MIT SIM S.p.A., reflect Mare Group’s ongoing strategy to manage its share capital effectively. The company now holds 178,231 own shares, accounting for 1.19% of its share capital. This move is part of Mare Group’s broader efforts to strengthen its financial positioning and enhance shareholder value, aligning with its focus on innovation and market expansion.

More about Mare Engineering Group SpA

Founded in 2001, Mare Group is a digital engineering company listed on the Euronext Growth Milan market. It specializes in technological innovation and serves over 1,000 clients with more than 300 employees across 16 operational and commercial offices. Mare Group has made significant investments in R&D and has completed 11 acquisitions since 2019, which have enhanced its product portfolio and market presence in the Italian innovation ecosystem.

Reliance Infrastructure Limited ( (IN:RELINFRA) ) has provided an update.

Reliance Infrastructure Limited announced that there has been no deviation or variation in the use of funds raised through a preferential issue of warrants amounting to Rs 753.60 Crore during the quarter ended December 31, 2024. BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC GBP ( (GB:THRG) ) has issued an update.

BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC announced the purchase of 150,000 of its own ordinary shares at an average price of 594.68 pence per share, to be held in treasury. This transaction, settling on February 18, 2025, will result in 21.11% of the company’s total issued share capital being held in treasury, affecting the voting rights and the figure used for regulatory notifications under the FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules.

More about BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC GBP

BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC is a financial company operating in the investment management sector, focusing on investment trusts. It primarily deals with the management and acquisition of shares and securities, catering to investors seeking diversified portfolios.

data.description:

The latest announcement is out from BioHarvest Sciences ( (TSE:BHSC) ).

BioHarvest Sciences Inc. announced its decision to voluntarily delist from the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE), effective February 14, 2025, while continuing its listing on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol ‘BHST’. This strategic move is aimed at consolidating its trading to Nasdaq, which the company believes will enhance long-term liquidity and shareholder value by eliminating the expenses and administrative efforts associated with maintaining a dual listing.

More about BioHarvest Sciences

BioHarvest Sciences Inc. operates in the biotechnology industry, primarily focusing on the development and commercialization of plant-based bio-products. The company is known for its innovative approaches in producing bio-sustainable products that target health and wellness markets.

data.description:

Nexco Resources, Inc. ( ($TSE:NXU.X) ) has provided an update.

Nexco Resources Inc. announced an update regarding a Management Cease Trade Order due to delays in filing its audited financial statements for the year ending August 31, 2024. The company is actively addressing the issue and anticipates resolving the default by February 28, 2025, by filing the necessary documents. This situation is managed under National Policy 12-203, with Nexco providing bi-weekly updates to maintain transparency. The resolution of this issue is crucial for Nexco’s operational continuity and maintaining investor trust.

More about Nexco Resources, Inc.

Nexco Resources Inc. operates in the resource industry, focusing on the extraction and development of natural resources. Based in Vancouver, British Columbia, the company is engaged in providing resources to various markets, primarily dealing with natural resource management and development.
